domain: Digital campus attendance and class-session check-in for universities and schools
description: Web and mobile-web attendance system that replaces manual roll call with short-lived rotating QR codes, student login, enrollment validation, optional GPS checks, realtime lecturer dashboards, manual fallback, and attendance reporting for class sections across terms and semesters.
organizationContext: University and campus training offices managing class sections, timetables, attendance policies, and academic compliance reporting
primaryCapabilities: Class session scheduling and open/close attendance
Mobile web QR scan with student login
Audit logging for check-in attempts and edits

designSystem.shadowStyle: hard offset shadows with no blur (shadow-xs through shadow-2xl)
